legacy-seed: the poker play-layer port carries the shipped SeatView button arrangement verbatim (disbot/views/casino/poker_table.py — fold / check-or-call / the three raise presets, then the host Deal-next/End controls). This is a faithful port of a shipped fixed layout, not a searchable arrangement (design-spec §9.3 confidence rule — telemetry sidecar is seeded-empty; any re-arrangement sim re-runs post-telemetry).
